task_completion.description: The agent successfully logged into Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or app menu is visible in the browser after logging in at localhost:8069.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Calendar application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent located the 'Tax Advisory - Alice Johnson' meeting on its original date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The meeting titled 'Tax Advisory - Alice Johnson' is visible on the calendar (originally 3 days from execution) or its summary pop-up is opened.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the meeting details to edit the schedule or dragged the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The meeting details form is open for editing the date/time, or the meeting block is actively being dragged across the calendar view.

task_completion.description: The meeting is successfully saved at the new date (10 days from execution) and time (10:00 AM).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view shows the meeting 'Tax Advisory - Alice Johnson' on the new date (exactly one week after the original date) at 10:00 AM, or the saved meeting details form shows the new date and time.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to reschedule the meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser is open to localhost:8069 and the Odoo GUI is used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing meeting rather than creating a duplicate.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should not be two meetings with the title 'Tax Advisory - Alice Johnson' on different dates; the original meeting must be moved.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, Python scripts, or direct database modifications to the Odoo backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 is running at http://localhost:8069. Login credentials are admin/admin. The meeting title is 'Tax Advisory - Alice Johnson'. The original schedule is 3 days from the task execution date at 10:00 AM. The target schedule is 10 days from the task execution date (exactly 1 week later) at 10:00 AM. The VLM should verify the meeting is moved to the correct target date and time.
